raw: {"perspective": "Readiness Manager", "summary": "Achieving the described milestones in 28 days is unusually fast, potentially reckless. External benchmarks suggest 3-6 months for similar progress with a larger team and budget.", "key_sources": "Y Combinator, Techstars, Paul Graham, Sam Altman, Naval", "gaps_in_current_canon": "Lack of peer-reviewed studies on solo-founder velocity, limited data on AI-assisted startup growth", "proposed_action": "Reassess priorities, focus on sustainability over speed, consider adding team members or mentors", "whistleblower_flag": "null"}
summary: Achieving the described milestones in 28 days is unusually fast, potentially reckless. External benchmarks suggest 3-6 months for similar progress with a larger team and budget.
key_sources: Y Combinator, Techstars, Paul Graham, Sam Altman, Naval
gaps_in_current_canon: Lack of peer-reviewed studies on solo-founder velocity, limited data on AI-assisted startup growth
proposed_action: Reassess priorities, focus on sustainability over speed, consider adding team members or mentors
